description: This police fragrance for men titled Passion is perfect as a gift or for self-indulgence. The head notes are lemon, lavender and mint with floral heart tones. The basic tones are cashmere wood, cedar and sandalwood.Quantity: 100 ml CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
